title: scrophularia scopolii var. parryi
intro: Scrophularia scopolii var. parryi, also known as Western figwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve muscle spasms, reduce pain and swelling, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Western figwort include its ability to calm digestive issues, alleviate anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. Western figwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
